desc: Extract the byte-exact target SPTM firmware Firmware/sptm.t6041.release.im4p (M4 Max; BuildManifest-confirmed in the IPSW but NOT present in the staged rootfs dmg 022-21678-099) from the M4 Max IPSW, decompress (pyimg4, IM4P/LZFSE-bvx2), and re-run the func_state[0..8] op-map + nvme_bootstrap decode to lock numeric offsets for the exact variant. The current decode (done/2026-07-14-t6040-sptm-nvme-guarded-backend-decode.md) used asahi_neo's t8132 (M4-base) sibling as proxy: structure and op-map are shared SPTM software, numeric offsets are not. Record SHA-256 provenance and add to the paired-fw corpus (ticket 030); keep the blob in scratchpad, commit only the writeup (no Apple binary in-repo)
author: fable
